title: cracca angustissima
intro: Cracca angustissima, also known as the narrowleaf cracca or narrow-leaved broom, is a perennial legume native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. Cracca angustissima is believed to provide several health benefits, including relief from urinary tract issues, menstrual cramps, and skin conditions such as eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support kidney function and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
